markdown:
# Climbing

While you're climbing, each foot of movement costs 1 extra foot (2 extra feet in [[difficult_terrain]]). You ignore this extra cost if you have a [[climb_speed]] and use it to climb. At the DM's option, climbing a slippery surface or one with few handholds might require a successful DC 15 Strength ([[athletics]]) check.
